name: Agentix Corp.
business: Agentix Corp is a clinical development stage corporation focused on pharmaceutical treatments in the metabolic disease space. The company has two key assets, AGTX-2004 and AGTX-2003, which are peripherally-restricted CB1 receptor antagonists for treating metabolic syndrome, obesity, type 2 diabetes, and non-alcoholic fatty liver disease. The company has not yet generated revenues and plans to partner with larger biopharma firms for later-stage development.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical development stage corporation with a focus on pharmaceutical treatments in the metabolic disease space and have not yet generated or realized meaningful revenues from our business.

tamClaims.claim: Global prevalence of diabetes is 8.8% (415 million) as of 2015 and expected to increase to 10.4% (642 million) by 2040.
tamClaims.sentence: According to IDF diabetes atlas, global prevalence of diabetes is 8.8% (415 m) as of 2015 and is expected to increase to 10.4% (642 m) by 2040.

tamClaims.claim: Global prevalence of metabolic syndrome is about one quarter of the world population, over a billion people.
tamClaims.sentence: some estimates have the global prevalence to be about one quarter of the world population which amounts to over a billion people in the world are now affected with metabolic syndrome.
